title: Teng Nong jiworn bin
original_title: เท่งโหน่ง จีวรบิน
overview: A businessman charters a flight to Tibet to pick up a monk. On the way back, the plane is hijacked, and the monk ends up in a war zone where he has to convince the bandits to change their evil ways.
